data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified parent acceptance criteria against shipped commit 69047617: overview stale-grooming cue/dialog replaces clipped rail; freeform model textbox removed; dispatch/pool default plus configured-agent override select implemented; stale beats sort by last-updated age descending; Select all/Oldest five/Clear controls present; first-class list/options/reviews/status APIs and OpenAPI/docs added; diagnostics runtime card added; advisory-only behavior preserved. Local gates and built-in browser review passed; remote CI and Coverage Badge passed on main.
